# gcore_cloud_k8s_cluster_kubeconfig (Data Source)

Kubeconfig provides the necessary configuration and credentials to access a Kubernetes cluster using kubectl or other Kubernetes clients.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gcore_cloud_k8s_cluster_kubeconfig" "example_cloud_k8s_cluster_kubeconfig" {
  project_id = 1
  region_id = 7
  cluster_name = "my-cluster"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_name` (String) Cluster name

### Optional

- `project_id` (Number) Project ID
- `region_id` (Number) Region ID

### Read-Only

- `client_certificate` (String) String in base64 format. Cluster client certificate
- `client_key` (String) String in base64 format. Cluster client key
- `cluster_ca_certificate` (String) String in base64 format. Cluster ca certificate
- `config` (String) Cluster kubeconfig
- `created_at` (String) Kubeconfig creation date
- `expires_at` (String) Kubeconfig expiration date
- `host` (String) Cluster host
